g.title: LQTS_QSP
g.text: Congenital Long QT Syndrome (LQTS, 선천성 QT 연장 증후군) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
KCNQ1/IKs (LQT1) · KCNH2-hERG/IKr (LQT2) · SCN5A/late-INa (LQT3) · Rarer subtypes & Acquired/Drug-induced LQTS (CiPA)
AP Prolongation -> EAD -> Dispersion of Repolarization -> Torsades de Pointes -> VF -> Sudden Cardiac Death
Beta-blockers (propranolol/nadolol) · Mexiletine (late-INa) · K+/Spironolactone · LCSD · ICD · QT-prolonging drug challenge
